cmd:
bash -c 
set -e
SRC=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/ElasticFusion/src
HIPCC=/opt/rocm/bin/hipcc
WORKDIR=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/ef-harness

cd $WORKDIR

echo '=== Compiling cudafuncs.cu ==='
$HIPCC -std=c++17 --offload-arch=gfx90a -O2 -fPIC -DUSE_HIP   -include $SRC/Core/Cuda/cuda_to_hip.h -I $SRC/Core/Cuda -I $SRC/hip_compat   -c $SRC/Core/Cuda/cudafuncs.cu -o cudafuncs.o

echo '=== Compiling reduce.cu ==='
$HIPCC -std=c++17 --offload-arch=gfx90a -O2 -fPIC -DUSE_HIP   -include $SRC/Core/Cuda/cuda_to_hip.h -I $SRC/Core/Cuda -I $SRC/hip_compat   -c $SRC/Core/Cuda/reduce.cu -o reduce.o

echo '=== Compiling device_memory.cpp ==='
g++ -std=c++17 -O2 -fPIC -DUSE_HIP -D__HIP_PLATFORM_AMD__ -I /opt/rocm/include   -I $SRC/hip_compat -I $SRC/Core/Cuda -I $SRC/Core/Cuda/containers   -c $SRC/Core/Cuda/containers/device_memory.cpp -o device_memory.o

echo '=== Compiling kernel_harness.cpp ==='
$HIPCC -std=c++17 -O2 -DUSE_HIP -D__HIP_PLATFORM_AMD__   -I $SRC/Core/Cuda -I $SRC/Core/Cuda/containers -I $SRC/hip_compat   -c $SRC/rocm_validation/kernel_harness.cpp -o kernel_harness.o

echo '=== Linking kernel_harness ==='
$HIPCC -std=c++17 --offload-arch=gfx90a   kernel_harness.o cudafuncs.o reduce.o device_memory.o -o kernel_harness

echo '=== Build complete ==='
ls -la kernel_harness

bash -c 
set -e
WORKDIR=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/agent_space/ef-harness

echo '=== Run 1 ==='
HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 $WORKDIR/kernel_harness
echo ''
echo '=== Run 2 ==='
HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 $WORKDIR/kernel_harness

bash -c 
set -e
VENV="B:/develop/TheRock/external-builds/pytorch/.venv"
ROCM="$VENV/Lib/site-packages/_rocm_sdk_devel"
CXX="$ROCM/lib/llvm/bin/clang++.exe"
ARCH=gfx1101
SRC="B:/develop/moat/projects/ElasticFusion/src"
OUT="B:/develop/moat/agent_space/ef-harness-win-gfx1101"
INCLUDES="-I $SRC/Core/Cuda -I $SRC/Core/Cuda/containers -I $SRC/hip_compat -I $SRC/third-party/Eigen -I $ROCM/include"
HIP_FLAGS="-std=c++17 -O2 -DUSE_HIP -D__HIP_PLATFORM_AMD__ -include $SRC/Core/Cuda/cuda_to_hip.h --offload-arch=$ARCH"
HOST_FLAGS="-std=c++17 -O2 -DUSE_HIP -D__HIP_PLATFORM_AMD__"

echo "=== Compiling cudafuncs.cu ===" && \
"$CXX" -x hip $HIP_FLAGS $INCLUDES -c "$SRC/Core/Cuda/cudafuncs.cu" -o "$OUT/cudafuncs.o" 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" && \
echo "=== Compiling reduce.cu ===" && \
"$CXX" -x hip $HIP_FLAGS $INCLUDES -c "$SRC/Core/Cuda/reduce.cu" -o "$OUT/reduce.o" 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" && \
echo "=== Compiling device_memory.cpp ===" && \
"$CXX" $HOST_FLAGS $INCLUDES -c "$SRC/Core/Cuda/containers/device_memory.cpp" -o "$OUT/device_memory.o" 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" && \
echo "=== Compiling kernel_harness.cpp ===" && \
"$CXX" $HOST_FLAGS $INCLUDES -c "$SRC/rocm_validation/kernel_harness.cpp" -o "$OUT/kernel_harness.o" 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" && \
echo "=== Linking ===" && \
"$CXX" -std=c++17 --offload-arch=$ARCH "$OUT/kernel_harness.o" "$OUT/cudafuncs.o" "$OUT/reduce.o" "$OUT/device_memory.o" -L "$ROCM/lib" -lamdhip64 -o "$OUT/kernel_harness.exe" 2>&1 && \
echo "=== Build complete ===" && \
ls -la "$OUT/kernel_harness.exe"
